candidate_definitions.text: This repository contains the code (in PyTorch) for "[Pyramid Stereo Matching Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.08669)" paper (CVPR 2018) by [Jia-Ren Chang](https://jiarenchang.github.io/) and [Yong-Sheng Chen](https://people.cs.nctu.edu.tw/~yschen/).
Attention-Aware Feature Aggregation for Real-time Stereo Matching on Edge Devices (ACCV, 2020)

This repository contains the code (in PyTorch) for "[Attention-Aware Feature Aggregation for Real-time Stereo Matching on Edge Devices](https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/ACCV2020/papers/Chang_Attention-Aware_Feature_Aggregation_for_Real-time_Stereo_Matching_on_Edge_Devices_A…
